evals.prompt: Simplify and verify these files. The function below has a redundant nested if that can collapse into a single guard clause. Apply a behaviour-preserving simplification, then run the supplied test command. file_set: src/util.js. test_command: node test.mjs

expectations.text: Emits exactly one of the contractual result tokens SIMPLIFIED or REVERTED and nothing ambiguous.
Preserves observable behaviour of classify (5->'pos', 0->'nonpos', null->'nonpos') as proven by the test command staying green.
The simplification flattens the nested if into a single guard clause rather than rewriting unrelated code.
